libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, external service, API key, or environment variable is needed. Prefer an in-process Spring Boot auto-configuration test that verifies the default context creates ChatMemoryRepository and ChatMemory beans, backs off when user beans are supplied, and exercises basic in-memory chat-memory operations.

deterministic_setup.reason: Provides the ChatMemory, ChatMemoryRepository, InMemoryChatMemoryRepository, and MessageWindowChatMemory types referenced by the auto-configuration.
Provides AutoConfiguration and conditional auto-configuration annotations/classes used by ChatMemoryAutoConfiguration.
Spring Boot's normal auto-configuration test pattern for this module uses ApplicationContextRunner to verify bean creation and conditional back-off behavior.

risks: Because the target POM marks its Spring AI model and Spring Boot dependencies optional, a scaffold that only depends on the target artifact may fail to compile or load the auto-configuration class.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether Spring Boot 4.1.0-RC1 test dependencies resolve cleanly in the harness.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The artifact is a tiny Spring Boot auto-configuration module whose meaningful behavior depends on optional Spring AI model and Spring Boot classes that are not transitively present from the published POM.
